goal: Set up the data layer — Liquibase migrations for seed admin, member-id FK, and refresh tokens table; update entities accordingly.

tasks.name: Create Liquibase migrations (seed admin, member-id, refresh tokens)
tasks.action: Create 3 Liquibase migration files: 005 seeds admin user with BCrypt password and ADMIN role assignment, 006 adds nullable member_id FK column to user_accounts referencing members(id), 007 creates refresh_tokens table with user_id FK, token, expires_at, revoked columns.

tasks.name: Create RefreshToken entity and RefreshTokenRepository
tasks.action: Create RefreshToken entity extending BaseEntity with userId, token, expiresAt, revoked fields. Create RefreshTokenRepository with findByToken, findByUserIdAndRevokedFalse, deleteByExpiresAtBefore, revokeAllByUserId methods.

tasks.name: Add memberId field to UserAccount entity
tasks.action: Add nullable memberId UUID field with @Column(name = "member_id") to UserAccount. No JPA relationship to Member (cross-module boundary).
verify: cd /Users/arnoldkizzitoh/Documents/haha/innercircle-sacco && mvn -pl sacco-security -am compile -q && mvn -pl sacco-security test -q

planVerify: cd /Users/arnoldkizzitoh/Documents/haha/innercircle-sacco && mvn -pl sacco-security -am compile -q && mvn -pl sacco-security test -q
commitMessage: feat(custom-auth-api): add migrations for seed admin, member-id FK, refresh tokens + entities
